package rulecoverage

func PositiveFmtFprintlnToStringsBuilder() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_fprintln_to_strings_builder"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Fprintln(&builder, ...)` instead of direct builder writes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
